videos.title: Fjellskiskolen (EP 1) - Svingteknikk (1/2)
videos.description:
Bratte utforbakker med fjellski er utfordrende, men kan bli morsomt og 
trygt med god teknikk. Programleder og «ski-pedagog» Pål-Trygve Gamme viser hvordan - skritt for skritt. Les gjern mer om fjellski på vår nettside. https://www.utemagasinet.no/fjellski . Her finner du masse gode tips og inspirasjon.

videos.title: Skikjøring Larsbreen
videos.description: Kjøring nedover Larsbreen på fjellski. Filmet av Algeir Rodahl.

videos.title: "Nice Friday" istedenfor "Black Friday" i Sporten Beitostølen
videos.description: Kjøpmann Asgeir Larsen i Sporten Beitostølen er kritisk til at forbruket og kjøpepresset skapes unødvendig stort med "Black Friday" hysteriet. Han innfører isteden  "Nice Friday" i sin butikk og gir 15 % av omsetningen denne dagen til "Aktiv mot Kreft".

videos.title: Hiking Besseggen | Jotunheimen National park in Norway. Gjendesheim -Memurubu
videos.description:
Unfortunately, we missed the morning ferry and we 
started our hike from Gjedesheim to Memurubu. We 
took the ferry the day after from Memurubu to 
Gjendesheim.

There are many hiking trails but we took trail A. 
Trail number B is easy if you want to get around the 
mountains without taking the ferry.
#Besseggen #Jutunheim #norway #hiking #hikingadventures #hikinglife

videos.title: BESSEGGEN HIKE, NORWAY | Full Besseggen Ridge Hike Overview & Review
videos.description:
The Besseggen Hike is located in Jotunheimen National Park and between the 3 major cities of Bergen, Oslo, and Trondheim. The National Park itself has over 250 mountains that are nearly 2000 meters high. The Besseggen hike is one of the most iconic and popular ones in all of Norway, with around 60,000 people hiking the trail on average each year. On the hike itself, you’ll be able to see amazing views of Lake Gjende, Lake Bessvatnet, glaciers, and endless mountain peaks. It’s a once-in-a-lifetime hike!

🚗 How To Get There
To get to the Besseggen Hike, we recommend driving your own car or renting one. There is apparently a bus that goes from Oslo to  Gjendesheim a few times per day which is called Valdresekspressen. 

☑️ Best deals on rental cars: https://www.discovercars.com/?a_aid=Wordwildhearts
☑️ Bus from Oslo: https://www.nor-way.no/en/routes/valdresekspressen

😴 Where to stay
One of the great things about Norway is that you’re allowed to wild camp in most natural areas. Near the Besseggen Hike for instance, there are camping spots near the parking lot along the Valdresflye National Tourist Route. 

There are also 7 other options near the trailhead: 
☑️ BESSEGGEN MOUNTAINPARK MAURVANGEN: https://besseggen.net/overnatting/besseggen-fjellpark/?lang=en
☑️ BESSHEIM MOUNTAIN LODGE AND CABINS: https://besseggen.net/overnatting/bessheim-fjellstue-og-hytter/?lang=en
☑️ SJODALEN HYTTETUN: https://besseggen.net/overnatting/sjodalen-hyttetun/?lang=en
☑️ MEMURUBU TOURIST LODGE: https://besseggen.net/overnatting/memurubu-turisthytte/?lang=en
☑️ HINDSÆTER HOTEL: https://besseggen.net/overnatting/hindsaeter-hotell/?lang=en
☑️ GJENDESHEIM TOURIST LODGE: https://besseggen.net/overnatting/gjendesheim-turisthytte/?lang=en
☑️ GJENDEBU TOURIST LODGE (DNT CABIN): https://besseggen.net/overnatting/gjendebu-turisthytte/?lang=en 
☑️ OTHER OPTIONS:
 Book via booking.com: https://www.booking.com/searchresults.en.html?region=15830&aid=7936148&no_rooms=1&group_adults=2

🎒 How To Prepare
1. You should pack the right stuff, check it here: https://www.worldwildhearts.com/post/best-hiking-gear
2. You should check the weather in advance to ensure conditions are good enough for hiking. Check the weather here: https://www.yr.no/nb
3. The trail is moderately difficult due to the exposed sections of rock near the top and the overall length. We don’t recommend hiking this trail if you don’t have any alpine hiking experience. If you’re not fully comfortable, you can also book a local guide for the hike. You can book a guided hike here: https://www.visitnorway.com/listings/guided-hike-over-the-besseggen-ridge/9657/

🥾 Downloadable Besseggen Trail Route: https://www.alltrails.com/explore/recording/besseggen-hike-e02e27e

🛥️ Shuttle Bus + Boat Ride
☑️ Shuttle parking prices: https://visitgjende.no/en/
☑️ Book Ferry Ride To Memurubu: https://gjende.no/en/time-tables/

📺 MORE NORWAY VIDEOS:
- Amazing Hut-to-Hut hike near Bergen: https://youtu.be/rVCc2BHYXIs
- Best Things to Do in Bergen: https://youtu.be/fRWBOiq77mQ
- Tromsø, Norway: best things to do: https://youtu.be/Vu7RGLutvcM
- Lofoten Islands Road Trip Itinerary: https://youtu.be/SyXvGl0HVXg

✍️ GET TRAVEL PLANNER AT 50% OFF:
https://www.worldwildhearts.com/product-page/comprehensive-travel-planner

💰 SAVE MONEY ON YOUR TRIP & PLATFORMS WE USE:
- Book cheap flights: https://skyscanner.pxf.io/c/3559813/1027991/13416?associateid=AFF_TRA_19354_00001
- Book accommodation: https://www.booking.com/index.html?aid=7936148

- Find the best hiking trails: https://alltrails.pxf.io/c/3559813/1865884/22353

⬇️ FREE DOWNLOAD:

videos.title: Besseggløpet 2013. -Tuva Toftdahl Staver tok sin tredje strake seier over Besseggen
videos.description: http://www.langsveien.no/index.php?side=1&sak=4618 -Tuva Toftdahl Staver tok sin tredje strake seier over Besseggen. 29. juli tok den imponerende dyktige jenta sin tredje seier på rad i Bessegløpet fra Memurubu til Gjendeosen! Tiden ble kun 1 time, førti minutter og 51 sekunder. I herreklassen var det Kjetil Hagtvedt Dammen som stod øverst på pallen med tiden 1.31.41.
